WellMade Foundation

Wisdom Empowering Love & Leadership

Building strong families through the WELL and MADE frameworks. Where every family has the tools to thrive across generations.

Start a WELL Explore MADE

The WELL Framework

WELL: Wisdom Empowering Love & Leadership

The WELL framework guides families to build intentional, love-centered legacies through wisdom and shared leadership.

WELL is not a program. It is a way of being. It calls each member of the family to lead with wisdom, nurture with love, and protect with intention. When a family operates within the WELL framework, every decision, tradition, and conversation becomes a thread in something bigger than any one person.

Start a WELL in 3 Steps

1

Gather Your Circle

Bring together the people who share your values and vision for family legacy. This is your WELL circle.

2

Commit to the Framework

Adopt the WELL principles of wisdom, empowerment, love, and leadership as the foundation of your family culture.

3

Build Together

Use the tools, retreats, and community of WellMade to grow your family's strength, connection, and purpose.

The MADE Framework

MADE: Empowering Families

Mothers And Daughters Empowered · Moms And Dads Empowered

MADE is the action arm of WellMade. It creates structured programs where parents and children grow together, building bonds that last across generations. Every MADE program is designed to be inclusive, culturally grounded, and community-driven.

T

MADE to Travel

Family travel experiences that build cultural awareness, independence, and shared memories across generations.

M

MADE to Money

Financial literacy programs designed for the whole family, building wealth-building habits and economic empowerment.

B

MADE in the Bay

Bay Area-based workshops, circles, and community events rooted in local culture and family connection.

M

MADE on Maui

Retreats and healing experiences on Maui, connecting families to land, culture, and each other in a transformative setting.

Cultural Roots

The Sampaguita Promise

The sampaguita, the national flower of the Philippines, symbolizes purity, devotion, and the strength of a promise kept. It is the living emblem of the WellMade Foundation and its commitment to every family it serves.

Under the MADE framework, our cultural roots run deep through two pillars:

S

Sampaguita

The Feminine

Grace, nurturing, and the sacred bond of motherhood

B

Bayani

The Masculine

Strength, protection, and the warrior spirit of legacy

How We Serve

Program Areas

Building strength, connection, and legacy through community

M

Mothers & Daughters Empowered

Empowerment programming for mothers and daughters to lead, heal, and grow together.

M

Moms & Dads Empowered

Resources and community for parents building strong, intentional families.

C

Community Fundraisers

Community-driven fundraising initiatives that bring people together for a shared purpose.

S

Safety Circles

Protective community spaces where families find support, resources, and belonging.

Y

Youth Development

Youth leadership and development programs that nurture the next generation of leaders.

F

Family Pentathlon

Annual family athletic tournament promoting health, teamwork, and friendly competition.

S

Sampaguita Sunday Gala

Annual scholarship gala held each May, celebrating culture and investing in futures.

M

Mabuhay Monday Awards

Community leadership awards recognizing those who embody the WellMade spirit.

Protecting the Vulnerable

The Anti-Trafficking Shield

"Every family deserves protection. The Shield exists to ensure that protection is real, funded, and relentless."

Supplying emergency sanctuary, legal infrastructure, and protective rescue initiatives for vulnerable families and individuals.

PureWellnessJoy

10%
W

WELL Proceeds

100%

Donations

Bloom Circle

Household Registry

The Bloom Circle is a living registry of every household that has joined the WellMade family. A digital tapestry of families committed to legacy, culture, and mutual protection.

Shield

Seasonal Programming

Throughout the Year

Spring

New beginnings. Enrollment opens, WELL circles launch, and families plant seeds for the year.

Summer

Travel, retreats, and community gatherings. MADE to Travel and MADE on Maui come alive.

Fall

Harvest wisdom. Financial literacy intensives, cultural celebrations, and family storytelling.

Winter

Rest and reflection. Legacy planning, year-end giving, and grounding rituals for the year ahead.
